title: Sporobolus rigens
taxonomy: Sporobolus rigens is classified within the family Poaceae, commonly known as grasses. It belongs to the order Poales, which includes various families of flowering plants related to grasses. The genus Sporobolus is a group of grasses that are typically found in tropical and temperate regions worldwide. Sporobolus rigens is specifically a species of grass commonly referred to as giant sand grass. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico.
